description.en: StartMessaging Privacy Policy. Learn how we collect, use, store, and protect your data.

title.pt: Diretrizes de Privacidade e Proteção de Dados
title.es: Pautas de Privacidad y Protección de Datos

subtitle.en: How we collect, use, and protect your company information, customer contact details, and message data across our global WhatsApp Business API and cloud SMS routes. Last updated: June 1, 2026.
subtitle.pt: Saiba como coletamos, usamos e protegemos as informações da sua empresa, contatos e dados de mensagens em nossa API global do WhatsApp Business e rotas de SMS. Última atualização: 1 de junho de 2026.
subtitle.es: Cómo recopilamos, utilizamos y protegemos la información de su empresa, los contactos de los clientes y los datos de mensajes a través de nuestra API global de WhatsApp Business y rutas de SMS. Última actualización: 1 de junio de 2026.
subtitle.id: Cara kami mengumpulkan, menggunakan, dan melindungi informasi perusahaan Anda, detail kontak pelanggan, dan data pesan di seluruh API WhatsApp Business global dan rute SMS cloud kami. Terakhir diperbarui: 1 Juni 2026.
subtitle.ar: كيفية جمع معلومات شركتك وتفاصيل جهات اتصال العملاء وبيانات الرسائل واستخدامها وحمايتها عبر واجهة برمجة تطبيقات WhatsApp Business العالمية ومسارات الرسائل القصيرة السحابية. آخر تحديث: 1 يونيو 2026.
subtitle.tr: Küresel WhatsApp Business API'miz ve bulut SMS rotalarımız üzerinden şirket bilgilerinizi, müşteri iletişim bilgilerinizi ve mesaj verilerinizi nasıl topladığımızı, kullandığımızı ve koruduğumuzu öğrenin. Son güncelleme: 1 Haziran 2026.

content.en:
1. Introduction

StartMessaging ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website (startmessaging.com) and cloud messaging APIs (the "Service").

By using our Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Account Information

When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, phone number, company name, billing details, and API credentials. We do not store plaintext API keys or raw payment details.

2.2 API Usage Data

When you use our APIs, we process recipient phone numbers and message content to deliver messages via Meta (WhatsApp) or partner telecommunications networks. We treat this as transient processing data.

2.3 Website Analytics

We collect standard anonymous web analytics (page views, browser type, etc.) to optimize our service performance. We use functional session cookies to secure your dashboard access.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected data to provide the messaging Service, process monthly subscription charges, manage account security, provide customer support, and comply with global legal requirements (such as GDPR and local privacy laws).

4. Data Retention

We retain account profiles and billing records for up to 7 years to comply with tax and audit regulations. API request logs and recipient numbers are retained for 90 days for debugging purposes, after which they are permanently purged. Message contents are kept for up to 30 days to facilitate delivery and reporting.

5. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We do not sell your personal data. We share processing data only with Meta (for WhatsApp Business API delivery), licensed telecom operators (for SMS delivery), and PCI-DSS compliant payment processors to handle subscriptions and usage billing.

6. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, AES-256 encryption at rest, secure access controls, and regular system audits to protect your API keys and client data.

7. Cookies

We use essential cookies for secure session authentication (sm_session) and local preference settings (sm_country and sm_notice_dismissed). We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking pixels.

8. Your Rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you have the right to access, correct, or request the erasure of your personal data. You may also object to processing or withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

9. International Data Transfers

Your data may be processed in countries where our cloud infrastructure operates. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for international transfers in compliance with GDPR, LGPD, and other applicable laws.

10. Contact Us

For any privacy-related inquiries, please email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

11. Compliance with the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA)

For users residing in Nigeria, we comply with the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) 2023. You have the right to access your personal data, object to its processing, request rectification or erasure, and withdraw consent. To exercise these rights or file inquiries, contact our Data Protection Office at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.
content.in:
1. Introduction

StartMessaging ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website (startmessaging.com), pre-funded wallet, OTP SMS APIs, and WhatsApp Business API services (the "Service").

Our platform is operated from India and is subject to Indian law, including the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act) and Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI) regulations.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Account and Billing Information

When you register, we collect your full name, email address, phone number, company name, GSTIN (optional, for tax invoices), and billing address. Prepaid wallet top-up records and payment transaction details are securely processed by our PCI-DSS compliant partner Razorpay (we do not store your credit card or bank details).

2.2 API Usage and Recipient Data

When you use our APIs, we process recipient phone numbers and message content. This includes transactional codes for our DLT and non-DLT routes and WhatsApp templates. Recipient numbers are processed transiently for message delivery.

2.3 Automatically Collected Data

We collect IP addresses and browser user-agent data for dashboard session security and functional logging. We do not engage in cross-site tracking or sell user data.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use collected data to deliver communication services, manage your prepaid wallet balance, issue tax invoices, provide customer support, detect fraud, and maintain compliance under TRAI's TCCCPR rules and the DPDP Act 2023.

4. Data Retention

We retain transaction invoices, wallet balance changes, and billing details for a minimum of 5 years (under Indian financial and Income Tax regulations). Operational API request logs (recipient phone numbers and delivery reports) are kept for 90 days for debug and billing dispute resolution, after which they are purged. Message contents are retained for up to 30 days.

5. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We share recipient numbers and message content with licensed SMS aggregators and telecom operators for SMS routing, and Meta Platforms, Inc. for WhatsApp delivery. Payments are handled securely via Razorpay. We may disclose data if legally required by Indian law enforcement or regulatory authorities.

6. Data Security

We enforce strict security controls including TLS 1.3 transit encryption, hashed storage of API keys, and restricted database access. No system is completely secure, and we invite security reports to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

7. Your Rights under the DPDP Act 2023

Under the DPDP Act 2023, you have the right to access a summary of your personal data, request correction of inaccurate data, request erasure (subject to legal retention requirements), file grievances, and nominate a representative. To exercise these rights, email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com. We respond to verified requests within 30 days.

8. Contact Us

For privacy queries, contact our Grievance Officer at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com, phone +91 6376383348, or via WhatsApp at +91 6376383348.

Nota: Esta política de privacidade é fornecida em inglês para garantir a exatidão jurídica. A versão em inglês é o documento oficial que rege o uso dos nossos serviços. A versão completa é apresentada abaixo.

1. Introduction

StartMessaging ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website (startmessaging.com) and cloud messaging APIs (the "Service").

By using our Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Account Information

When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, phone number, company name, billing details, and API credentials. We do not store plaintext API keys or raw payment details.

2.2 API Usage Data

When you use our APIs, we process recipient phone numbers and message content to deliver messages via Meta (WhatsApp) or partner telecommunications networks. We treat this as transient processing data.

2.3 Website Analytics

We collect standard anonymous web analytics (page views, browser type, etc.) to optimize our service performance. We use functional session cookies to secure your dashboard access.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected data to provide the messaging Service, process monthly subscription charges, manage account security, provide customer support, and comply with global legal requirements (such as GDPR and local privacy laws).

4. Data Retention

We retain account profiles and billing records for up to 7 years to comply with tax and audit regulations. API request logs and recipient numbers are retained for 90 days for debugging purposes, after which they are permanently purged. Message contents are kept for up to 30 days to facilitate delivery and reporting.

5. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We do not sell your personal data. We share processing data only with Meta (for WhatsApp Business API delivery), licensed telecom operators (for SMS delivery), and PCI-DSS compliant payment processors to handle subscriptions and usage billing.

6. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, AES-256 encryption at rest, secure access controls, and regular system audits to protect your API keys and client data.

7. Cookies

We use essential cookies for secure session authentication (sm_session) and local preference settings (sm_country and sm_notice_dismissed). We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking pixels.

8. Your Rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you have the right to access, correct, or request the erasure of your personal data. You may also object to processing or withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

9. International Data Transfers

Your data may be processed in countries where our cloud infrastructure operates. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for international transfers in compliance with GDPR, LGPD, and other applicable laws.

10. Contact Us

For any privacy-related inquiries, please email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

11. Direitos dos Titulares de Dados no Brasil (LGPD)

Em conformidade com a Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD - Lei nº 13.709/2018), os usuários no Brasil têm o direito de confirmar a existência de tratamento, acessar seus dados, corrigir dados incompletos ou inexatos, solicitar a eliminação ou portabilidade de dados pessoais e revogar o consentimento previamente fornecido. Para exercer seus direitos sob a LGPD, envie um e-mail para startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.
content.es:
Nota: Esta política de privacidad se proporciona en inglés para garantizar la precisión legal. La versión en inglés es el documento oficial que rige el uso de nuestros servicios. La versión completa se presenta a continuación.

1. Introduction

StartMessaging ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website (startmessaging.com) and cloud messaging APIs (the "Service").

2. Information We Collect

2.2 API Usage Data

2.3 Website Analytics

We collect standard anonymous web analytics (page views, browser type, etc.) to optimize our service performance. We use functional session cookies to secure your dashboard access.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected data to provide the messaging Service, process monthly subscription charges, manage account security, provide customer support, and comply with global legal requirements (such as GDPR and local privacy laws).

4. Data Retention

We retain account profiles and billing records for up to 7 years to comply with tax and audit regulations. API request logs and recipient numbers are retained for 90 days for debugging purposes, after which they are permanently purged. Message contents are kept for up to 30 days to facilitate delivery and reporting.

5. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We do not sell your personal data. We share processing data only with Meta (for WhatsApp Business API delivery), licensed telecom operators (for SMS delivery), and PCI-DSS compliant payment processors to handle subscriptions and usage billing.

6. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures including TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, AES-256 encryption at rest, secure access controls, and regular system audits to protect your API keys and client data.

7. Cookies

We use essential cookies for secure session authentication (sm_session) and local preference settings (sm_country and sm_notice_dismissed). We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking pixels.

8. Your Rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you have the right to access, correct, or request the erasure of your personal data. You may also object to processing or withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

9. International Data Transfers

Your data may be processed in countries where our cloud infrastructure operates. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for international transfers in compliance with GDPR, LGPD, and other applicable laws.

10. Contact Us

For any privacy-related inquiries, please email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

11. Derechos ARCO y Privacidad (México)

De conformidad con la Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares de México, usted tiene derecho a conocer qué datos personales tenemos de usted, para qué los utilizamos y las condiciones del uso que les damos (Acceso). Asimismo, es su derecho solicitar la corrección de su información personal en caso de que esté desactualizada, sea inexacta o incompleta (Rectificación); que la eliminemos de nuestros registros o bases de datos cuando considere que la misma no está siendo utilizada adecuadamente (Cancelación); así como oponerse al uso de sus datos personales para fines específicos (Oposición). Estos se conocen como Derechos ARCO. Para ejercerlos, contáctenos en startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

10. Contact Us

For any privacy-related inquiries, please email us at startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.

11. Kepatuhan UU PDP (Indonesia)

Bagi pengguna di Indonesia, pemrosesan data pribadi Anda tunduk pada Undang-Undang Pelindungan Data Pribadi (UU PDP No. 27 Tahun 2022). Anda memiliki hak atas informasi tentang data pribadi Anda, hak untuk memperbaiki, memperbarui, atau menghapus data Anda, hak untuk menarik persetujuan pemrosesan data pribadi, dan hak untuk mengajukan keberatan. Untuk mengajukan permohonan pemenuhan hak Anda berdasarkan UU PDP, hubungi kami di startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.
content.ar:
ملاحظة: تم توفير سياسة الخصوصية هذه باللغة الإنجليزية لضمان الدقة القانونية. النسخة الإنجليزية هي المستند الرسمي الذي يحكم استخدام خدماتنا. النسخة الكاملة متوفرة أدناه.

11. الامتثال لقانون حماية البيانات الشخصية الإماراتي (PDPL)

بالنسبة للمستخدمين المقيمين في دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة، فإننا نمتثل للمرسوم بقانون اتحادي رقم 45 لسنة 2021 بشأن حماية البيانات الشخصية (PDPL). تمنحك هذه اللائحة الحق في الوصول إلى بياناتك الشخصية، أو طلب تصحيحها أو مسحها، أو تقييد معالجتها، أو سحب موافقتك. لممارسة هذه الحقوق، يرجى التواصل معنا عبر البريد الإلكتروني startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com.
content.tr:
Not: Bu gizlilik politikası, yasal doğruluğu sağlamak amacıyla İngilizce olarak sunulmuştur. İngilizce sürüm, hizmetlerimizin kullanımını düzenleyen resmi belgedir. Tam sürüm aşağıda sunulmuştur.

11. Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (KVKK) Uyumluluğu (Türkiye)

6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (KVKK) uyarınca, Türkiye'deki kullanıcılarımızın kişisel verileri, veri sorumlusu sıfatıyla StartMessaging tarafından işlenmektedir. KVKK kapsamında, kişisel verilerinizin işlenip işlenmediğini öğrenme, işlenmişse buna ilişkin bilgi talep etme, işlenme amacını ve bunların amacına uygun kullanılıp kullanılmadığını öğrenme, yurt içinde veya yurt dışında kişisel verilerin aktarıldığı üçüncü kişileri bilme, verilerinizin eksik veya yanlış işlenmiş olması hâlinde bunların düzeltilmesini isteme ve silinmesini veya yok edilmesini talep etme haklarına sahipsiniz. Haklarınızı kullanmak için startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com adresine başvurabilirsiniz.
